title: phyllanthus nummulariifolius
intro: Phyllanthus nummulariifolius, also known as Gongura or Amla, is a type of plant that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family and is native to tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus nummulariifolius include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting liver function. It is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also consumed as a fresh leafy green vegetable in many parts of Asia.
